caseStudies.title: Pyscle
caseStudies.problem: Outdated UI, poor mobile experience, limited customization, and no dynamic pricing — making the store hard to manage and less effective.
caseStudies.solution: Revamped the Shopify theme, fixed responsiveness, added dynamic pricing, and made the store fully customizable.
caseStudies.result: Faster, smoother, and more flexible store with improved user experience and better product presentation.

caseStudies.title: Mustdulce
caseStudies.problem: No existing website, no online presence, and no structured way to attract customers.
caseStudies.solution: Built the website from scratch and implemented strong SEO to drive organic traffic and inquiries.
caseStudies.result: Consistent customer inquiries and a strong online presence generating real business leads.

caseStudies.title: Eden QR
caseStudies.problem: The platform was half-built with major bugs and incomplete features, making it unstable and not ready for launch. There was no clear structure to deliver a usable product.
caseStudies.solution: We completed the entire system, fixed critical bugs, and refined the overall functionality. Ensured the platform was stable, scalable, and ready for real users.
caseStudies.result: Successfully launched a fully functional digital memorial platform with QR-based memory pages. Users can now easily preserve and share memories of their loved ones.
